label: 连通分量标记
description: 对网格中所有非零区域进行连通分量标记，每个连通分量赋予唯一ID
description-en: Label connected components of non-zero regions in a grid, assigning each a unique ID.
icon: 一个方格网格中散布几块不同颜色的连通区域，每块区域内部颜色一致，扁平插画风格，简洁小图标，主色2种

inputs.name: grid
inputs.label: 输入网格
inputs.description: 待标记的二维网格，非零格子视为前景
inputs.description-en: Input 2D grid; non-zero cells are treated as foreground.

inputs.name: connectivity
inputs.label: 连通方式
inputs.description: 连通判定方式：4=上下左右四邻域，8=含对角线八邻域

outputs.name: grid
outputs.label: 标记网格
outputs.description: 标记后的网格，每个连通分量为唯一正整数ID，背景为0
outputs.description-en: Labeled grid: each connected component gets a unique positive integer ID; background is 0.

outputs.name: numComponents
outputs.label: 分量数量
outputs.description: 检测到的连通分量总数
outputs.description-en: Total number of connected components found.

alg_tag: 标记网格非零区域的连通分量
